hypothesis: If thermodynamic data, cellular automata simulation, machine learning descriptors, and commercial database integration are combined into a unified computational workflow, then it will be possible to systematically identify cost-effective and technically feasible synthesis routes for inorganic materials such as Ca2SiO4 without requiring exhaustive experimental screening, because the multi-module approach can simultaneously optimize thermodynamic favorability, reaction probability, product properties, and reactant market pricing across a large chemical space.
